parameters.content:
## I'm a note 
Precisa chegar:  Flow 
Execution ID

parameters.query:
UPDATE flow_step_executions
SET status = 'cancelled'
WHERE flow_execution_id = $1::uuid 
  AND status = 'scheduled';


UPDATE flow_executions
SET status = 'cancelled', cancelled_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

UPDATE flow_step_executions 
SET 
    schedule_id = '{{ $json.messageId || $json.id }}', 
    cancelled_at = NULL,
    executed_at = NULL
WHERE flow_execution_id = '{{ $("REATIVAR FLUXO").item.json.flow_execution_id }}'::uuid
  AND step_order = {{ $("REATIVAR FLUXO").item.json.step_order }};

WITH steps_futuros AS (
    -- 1. Pega TODOS os steps que estão agendados no momento
    SELECT id, schedule_id, step_order
    FROM flow_step_executions
    WHERE flow_execution_id = $1::uuid 
      AND status = 'scheduled'
),
congela_steps AS (
    -- 2. Coloca eles na "geladeira" (paused_standby) para não perdermos a data original
    UPDATE flow_step_executions
    SET status = 'paused_standby'
    WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM steps_futuros)
),
pausa_execucao AS (
    -- 3. Pausa a execução principal do cliente
    UPDATE flow_executions
    SET status = 'paused'
    WHERE id = $1::uuid
)
-- 4. Retorna a lista para o n8n ir na API e DELETAR todos
SELECT schedule_id, step_order 
FROM steps_futuros
ORDER BY step_order ASC;

WITH marcacao_cancelados AS (
    -- 1. Cancela TODOS os steps futuros de uma vez e captura os IDs do Scheduler
    UPDATE flow_step_executions
    SET 
        status = 'cancelled',
        cancelled_at = NOW()
    WHERE flow_execution_id = $1::uuid 
      AND status = 'scheduled'
    RETURNING id AS step_id, schedule_id, step_order
),
cancela_execucao AS (
    -- 2. Mata a execução principal
    UPDATE flow_executions
    SET 
        status = 'cancelled',
        cancelled_at = NOW()
    WHERE id = $1::uuid
)
-- 3. Retorna a lista de TODOS os steps pendentes para o n8n deletar na API
SELECT 
    step_id, 
    schedule_id, 
    step_order 
FROM marcacao_cancelados
ORDER BY step_order ASC;

WITH reativa_execucao AS (
    -- 1. Acorda o cliente
    UPDATE flow_executions
    SET status = 'active'
    WHERE id = $1::uuid
),
descarta_vencidos AS (
    -- 2. Descarta quem venceu durante a pausa
    UPDATE flow_step_executions
    SET status = 'skipped', cancelled_at = NOW()
    WHERE flow_execution_id = $1::uuid 
      AND status = 'paused_standby'
      AND scheduled_for <= NOW()
),
recupera_sobreviventes AS (
    -- 3. Reativa os que ainda estão no futuro e captura os dados
    UPDATE flow_step_executions
    SET status = 'scheduled'
    WHERE flow_execution_id = $1::uuid 
      AND status = 'paused_standby'
      AND scheduled_for > NOW()
    RETURNING flow_execution_id, scheduled_for AS scheduled_at, step_order
)
-- 4. Retorna para o n8n no formato exato que o seu nó HTTP POST exige!
SELECT 
    flow_execution_id, 
    scheduled_at, 
    step_order 
FROM recupera_sobreviventes
ORDER BY step_order ASC;
